entries.source: "Ask me one question that helps me start."
entries.value: "Cuir ceist amháin orm a chabhróidh liom tosú."

entries.source: "Do not give the final answer yet. Ask me what I think the first step is."
entries.value: "Ná tabhair an freagra deiridh fós. Fiafraigh díom cad é an chéad chéim, dar liom."

entries.source: "Explain why this step works."
entries.value: "Mínigh cén fáth a n-oibríonn an chéim seo."

entries.source: "Give me a hint, not the final answer."
entries.value: "Tabhair leid dom, ní an freagra deiridh."

entries.source: "Give me a similar problem after I solve this one."
entries.value: "Tabhair fadhb chosúil dom tar éis dom an ceann seo a réiteach."

entries.source: "Here is my answer. What misconception does it show?"
entries.value: "Seo mo fhreagra. Cén míthuiscint a léiríonn sé?"

entries.source: "Here is my attempt. What is the smallest hint that would help?"
entries.value: "Seo mo iarracht. Cad é an leid is lú a chabhródh?"

entries.source: "Make a similar practice problem after this one."
entries.value: "Déan fadhb chleachtaidh chosúil tar éis na cinn seo."

entries.source: "Make me explain the idea back before you continue."
entries.value: "Cuir orm an smaoineamh a mhíniú ar ais sula leanann tú ar aghaidh."

entries.source: "Quiz me on this topic and wait for my answer."
entries.value: "Cuir ceisteanna orm faoin ábhar seo agus fan le mo fhreagra."

entries.source: "What misconception would lead someone to my wrong answer?"
entries.value: "Cén mhíthuiscint a thabharfadh duine chuig mo fhreagra mícheart?"

entries.source: A simple test
entries.value: Tástáil shimplí

entries.source: A strong study loop looks like this:
entries.value: Seo mar a fhéachann lúb láidir staidéir:

entries.source: AI can help you learn faster. It can also help you avoid learning entirely.
entries.value: Is féidir le IS cabhrú leat foghlaim níos tapúla. Is féidir leis cabhrú leat foghlaim a sheachaint go hiomlán freisin.

entries.source: AI tutor
entries.value: Teagascóir IS

entries.source: Ask for a hint. Do not ask for the final answer yet.
entries.value: Iarr leid. Ná hiarr an freagra deiridh fós.

entries.source: Ask for a small hint.
entries.value: Iarr leid bheag.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check that step.
entries.value: Iarr ar an IS an chéim sin a sheiceáil.

entries.source: At the end of a study session, ask yourself three questions:
entries.value: Ag deireadh seisiúin staidéir, cuir trí cheist ort féin:

entries.source: Attempt first. Spend three minutes trying without AI.
entries.value: Déan iarracht ar dtús. Caith trí nóiméad ag triail gan IS.

entries.source: Avoid the copy trap
entries.value: Seachain gaiste na cóipeála

entries.source: Build a loop
entries.value: Tóg lúb

entries.source: Can I do a new example?
entries.value: An féidir liom sampla nua a dhéanamh?

entries.source: Can I explain the idea without looking?
entries.value: An féidir liom an smaoineamh a mhíniú gan féachaint?

entries.source: Different learning jobs need different flows. Use a homework coach for hints, a math step coach for problem solving, a Socratic tutor for deep understanding, flashcards for recall, and quizzes for pressure-tested practice.
entries.value: Teastaíonn sreafaí éagsúla ó phoist foghlama éagsúla. Úsáid cóitseálaí obair bhaile le haghaidh leideanna, cóitseálaí céime matamaitice le haghaidh réiteach fadhbanna, teagascóir Sócraiteach le haghaidh tuiscint dhomhain, spléachchártaí le haghaidh cuimhne, agus tráthanna ceiste le haghaidh cleachtadh a sheasann brú.

entries.source: Do I know what to practice next?
entries.value: An bhfuil a fhios agam cad ba chóir a chleachtadh ina dhiaidh sin?

entries.source: Explain your move. Tell the AI why you chose the next step.
entries.value: Mínigh do bheart. Inis don IS cén fáth ar roghnaigh tú an chéad chéim eile.

entries.source: Fix the misconception.
entries.value: Deisigh an mhíthuiscint.

entries.source: For writing, that means using Writing Coach to improve a thesis, structure, or paragraph while keeping your voice. For code, it means using Code Tutor to explain errors, ask you to predict output, and help you debug rather than pasting a complete solution. For exams, it means using Exam Prep Planner to decide what to review first and how to test yourself.
entries.value: I gcás scríbhneoireachta, ciallaíonn sé sin Writing Coach a úsáid chun tráchtas, struchtúr, nó mír a fheabhsú agus do ghuth a choinneáil. I gcás cód, ciallaíonn sé Code Tutor a úsáid chun earráidí a mhíniú, iarraidh ort aschur a thuar, agus cabhrú leat dífhabhtú seachas réiteach iomlán a ghreamú. I gcás scrúduithe, ciallaíonn sé Exam Prep Planner a úsáid chun cinneadh a dhéanamh cad ba chóir a athbhreithniú ar dtús agus conas tú féin a thástáil.

entries.source: Good prompts for honest studying
entries.value: Prasaí maithe don staidéar macánta

entries.source: Here is a slightly stronger version you can reuse:
entries.value: Seo leagan beagán níos láidre ar féidir leat a athúsáid:

entries.source: How to study with AI without cheating yourself
entries.value: Conas staidéar a dhéanamh le IS gan caimiléireacht a dhéanamh ort féin

entries.source: If the answer is yes, AI helped you study. If the answer is no, the next move is not more reading. It is active practice. Open Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, or the AI learning prompt library and turn the topic into a task you have to attempt.
entries.value: Má tá an freagra dearfach, chabhraigh IS leat staidéar a dhéanamh. Má tá an freagra diúltach, ní níos mó léitheoireachta an chéad bheart eile. Is cleachtadh gníomhach é. Oscail Learn Anything, Socratic Instruction, nó leabharlann prasanna foghlama IS agus tiontaigh an t-ábhar ina thasc a chaithfidh tú a thriail.

entries.source: If the work is homework, start in Homework Coach. If it is math, use Math Step Coach and ask it to check one step at a time. If you are trying to understand a concept deeply, use Socratic Instruction and answer the questions before asking for a summary.
entries.value: Más obair bhaile í an obair, tosaigh i Homework Coach. Más matamaitic í, úsáid Math Step Coach agus iarr air céim amháin ag an am a sheiceáil. Má tá tú ag iarraidh coincheap a thuiscint go domhain, úsáid Socratic Instruction agus freagair na ceisteanna sula n-iarrann tú achoimre.

entries.source: If you paste a homework question and copy the final answer, you may finish the task, but you have not built the skill. If you ask for a hint, explain your thinking, compare your answer, and try a similar problem, AI becomes a study partner instead of a shortcut.
entries.value: Má ghreamaíonn tú ceist obair bhaile agus má chóipeálann tú an freagra deiridh, b’fhéidir go gcríochnóidh tú an tasc, ach níor thóg tú an scil. Má iarrann tú leid, má mhíníonn tú do smaointeoireacht, má chuireann tú do fhreagra i gcomparáid, agus má thriaileann tú fadhb chosúil, éiríonn IS ina chomhpháirtí staidéir seachas ina aicearra.

entries.source: Practice a new version.
entries.value: Cleacht leagan nua.

entries.source: Practice transfer. Ask for a similar problem with different numbers, wording, or context.
entries.value: Cleacht aistriú. Iarr fadhb chosúil le huimhreacha, foclaíocht, nó comhthéacs difriúil.

entries.source: Recall later. Turn the weak spot into a card in Flashcard Builder or a short quiz in Quiz Me On Trivia.
entries.value: Cuimhnigh níos déanaí. Tiontaigh an pointe lag ina chárta i Flashcard Builder nó ina thráth ceiste gearr i Quiz Me On Trivia.

entries.source: Request diagnosis. Ask what your answer reveals about your understanding.
entries.value: Iarr diagnóis. Fiafraigh cad a nochtann do fhreagra faoi do thuiscint.

entries.source: study skills
entries.value: scileanna staidéir

entries.source: Studying with AI works best when the tool keeps you in the driver's seat.
entries.value: Oibríonn staidéar le IS is fearr nuair a choinníonn an uirlis tusa i suíochán an tiománaí.

entries.source: That is a warning sign. Recognition is not recall. Reading a clear explanation is not the same as being able to solve a new problem, write a paragraph, or answer a question under pressure.
entries.value: Is comhartha rabhaidh é sin. Ní cuimhne é aithint. Ní hionann míniú soiléir a léamh agus bheith in ann fadhb nua a réiteach, mír a scríobh, nó ceist a fhreagairt faoi bhrú.

entries.source: That loop is slower than copying, but it is much faster than staying confused.
entries.value: Tá an lúb sin níos moille ná cóipeáil, ach i bhfad níos tapúla ná fanacht mearbhall.

entries.source: The copy trap is subtle. It does not always feel like cheating. Sometimes it feels like being efficient. The AI explains something beautifully, you nod along, and then you move on. Ten minutes later you cannot reproduce the idea without the answer in front of you.
entries.value: Tá gaiste na cóipeála caolchúiseach. Ní mhothaíonn sé i gcónaí mar chaimiléireacht. Uaireanta mothaíonn sé mar éifeachtúlacht. Míníonn an IS rud go hálainn, nodálann tú, agus ansin bogann tú ar aghaidh. Deich nóiméad ina dhiaidh sin ní féidir leat an smaoineamh a atáirgeadh gan an freagra os do chomhair.

entries.source: The difference is how you use it.
entries.value: Is í an difríocht conas a úsáideann tú é.

entries.source: The question is not whether AI should be part of studying. For many learners it already is. The better question is whether the tool is helping you build memory, judgment, and confidence, or quietly removing the exact struggle that makes learning stick.
entries.value: Ní hí an cheist an ba chóir IS a bheith mar chuid den staidéar. Do go leor foghlaimeoirí, tá sí ann cheana. Is í an cheist níos fearr an bhfuil an uirlis ag cabhrú leat cuimhne, breithiúnas, agus muinín a thógáil, nó an bhfuil sí ag baint go ciúin an streachailt chruinn a fhágann go bhfanann foghlaim.

entries.source: The transfer step is the key. If you can only solve the exact problem the AI just walked through, you have learned the example. If you can solve a cousin of the problem, you are starting to learn the idea.
entries.value: Is í céim an aistrithe an eochair. Mura féidir leat ach an fhadhb chruinn a shiúil an IS tríd a réiteach, tá an sampla foghlamtha agat. Más féidir leat gaol leis an bhfadhb a réiteach, tá tú ag tosú ar an smaoineamh a fhoghlaim.

entries.source: These are not magic words. They are guardrails. They keep the conversation focused on thinking instead of answer collection.
entries.value: Ní focail draíochta iad seo. Is teorainneacha iad. Coinníonn siad an comhrá dírithe ar smaointeoireacht seachas ar bhailiú freagraí.

entries.source: These prompts keep you active. They make the AI support your reasoning rather than replace it.
entries.value: Coinníonn na prasaí seo thú gníomhach. Cuireann siad ar an IS tacú le do réasúnaíocht seachas í a ionadú.

entries.source: Try prompts like these:
entries.value: Bain triail as prasaí mar seo:

entries.source: Try the problem yourself.
entries.value: Bain triail as an bhfadhb tú féin.

entries.source: Use AI as a coach for understanding, practice, and feedback instead of a shortcut that quietly removes the learning.
entries.value: Úsáid IS mar chóitseálaí don thuiscint, don chleachtadh, agus don aiseolas in ionad aicearra a bhaintíonn an fhoghlaim go ciúin.

entries.source: Use AI for the thinking around the answer
entries.value: Úsáid IS don smaointeoireacht timpeall an fhreagra

entries.source: Use prompts that make the AI slow down:
entries.value: Úsáid prasaí a chuireann ar an IS moilliú:

entries.source: Use the right mode
entries.value: Úsáid an mód ceart

entries.source: Use this rule: after any AI explanation, close the loop with output from your own mind. Write the idea back. Solve a fresh version. Make a flashcard. Teach it to an imaginary younger student. Ask for a quiz. The more the session asks you to produce, the less likely you are to fool yourself.
entries.value: Úsáid an riail seo: tar éis aon mhíniú IS, dún an lúb le haschur ó d’intinn féin. Scríobh an smaoineamh ar ais. Réitigh leagan úr. Déan spléachchárta. Múin é do dhalta níos óige samhlaíoch. Iarr tráth na gceist. Dá mhéad a iarrann an seisiún ort a tháirgeadh, is ea is lú seans go gcuirfidh tú dallamullóg ort féin.

entries.source: Write your next step.
entries.value: Scríobh do chéad chéim eile.
